Project Support to KHAS from TÜBİTAK-US National Science Foundation (NSF) Bilateral Cooperation Program

Department of Molecular Biology and Genetics faculty member Dr. Assist. Prof. Mustafa Çetin’s project titled “Preparation and Applications of Iron-Based Catalysts for the Reduction of Amides”, which will be carried out in collaboration with Prof. Michael Findlater from the University of California Merced, has been awarded support under the TÜBİTAK-US National Science Foundation (NSF) Bilateral Cooperation Program.

We congratulate Mustafa and wish him continued success.
